title: Castle on the Hill
why_this_song: Castle on the Hill by Ed Sheeran (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "When we watched the sunset over the castle on the hill"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "When we watched the sunset over the castle on the hill"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I was running from my brother and his friends"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When I was six years old, I broke my leg"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I know I've grown, but I can't wait to go home"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

One friend left to sell clothes

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hill" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hill" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "castle" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Found my heart and broke it here
We found weekend jobs, when we got paid
One had two kids, but lives alone

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Made friends and lost them through the years
Over the castle on the hill (hill)
One's just barely getting by, but

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Castle on the Hill" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Castle on the Hill"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ed Sheeran one question about "Castle on the Hill", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ed Sheeran sobre "Castle on the Hill", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Castle on the Hill" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Castle on the Hill" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
